name: @dnb/eufemia-mcp
description: Eufemia MCP server for AWS Lambda

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && yarn workspace @dnb/eufemia build:docs && esbuild src/transports/lambda-handler.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=dist/lambda-handler.mjs '--external:@aws-sdk/*' && mkdir -p dist/docs && cp -R ../../packages/dnb-eufemia/build/docs/. dist/docs && cd dist && zip -rq lambda.zip lambda-handler.mjs docs
scripts.deploy: yarn build && terraform -chdir=infra init && terraform -chdir=infra apply -auto-approve
scripts.deploy:plan: yarn build && terraform -chdir=infra init && terraform -chdir=infra plan
